articles.title: Emily Blunt Was “A Bit Terrified” To Use AI In Making ‘Disclosure Day’ Alien Voice, Details Creating “Really Strange Sounds” Herself
articles.summary: As Steven Spielberg explores extraterrestrial life onscreen once again, the 'Disclosure Day' director's set was all about embracing the human element.

articles.title: Evoke Entertainment Closes $35 Million Production Financing Facility Backed By Major Private Credit Fund
articles.summary: Evoke Entertainment has closed a senior secured production financing facility of up to $35 million with an eye toward expanding its film & TV output.

articles.title: Filmmaker Jorge Gutierrez Drops Plans for AI-Generated Series Funded by Amazon MGM Studios After Backlash
articles.summary: Jorge Gutierrez said he is no longer going to make an AI-generated animated series for Amazon's Prime Video under the company's new initiative to fund AI entertainment projects

articles.title: ‘Good Advice Cupcake’ Creator Slams BuzzFeed for Partnering With Amazon on AI-Created Show About Character: “Disgusted”
articles.summary: The creator of Cuppy, star of The Good Advice Cupcake, is calling out BuzzFeed for partnering with Amazon on an AI-created series about character.

articles.title: Illinois Legislature passes historic AI bill that would require third-party safety audits
articles.summary: The measure goes beyond legislation in California and New York regulating America’s largest AI companies. It still needs to be signed by the governor.

articles.title: one of three animated AI series
articles.summary:
Amazon MGM Studios greenlit three shows as part of its GenAI Creators’ Fund, which gives producers access to the company’s AI filmmaking platform. The projects include Cupcake & Friends from BuzzFeed Studios; Love, Diana Music Hunters from former Nickelodeon exec Albie Hecht; and Punky Duck from animator Jorge R. Gutierrez.
All three shows will debut on Prime Video “at a future date.”
[Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/LoveDianaHeartBeats-Onstage-v002.pn
